description_long: This is a compact, cylindrical bottle of lotion with a rounded top and a slightly tapered body, designed for easy handling. The main body is a translucent off-white plastic, allowing a faint view of the contents inside. The front features a dark label with the brand 'Rexona' and a checkmark logo, along with some additional text and graphics. The bottom section is black, likely indicating a grip or base, and the cap appears to be integrated into the top of the bottle. The back side displays a barcode and product information in a lighter, less prominent label. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for personal care use in urban environments.
description: A compact, translucent off-white lotion bottle with a black base and a dark front label featuring the 'Rexona' brand. The design is sleek, with a rounded top and integrated cap.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dark label with the 'Rexona' logo and product details, as well as the rounded top and black base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bottle's tapered, ergonomic shape and the smooth transition between the translucent body and black base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the lighter label with barcode and product information, with the black base still visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bottle's curvature and the subtle seam between the cap and body.
